title: Phase 9 – Continuous Monitoring Schema
description: Validates the payload for setting up ongoing compliance monitoring.

model_id.description: Identifier of the deployed model in production

production_data_stream.description: URI of the production data stream to monitor

baseline_data_ref.description: Reference to the baseline dataset used during certification

monitoring_thresholds.description: Threshold values for triggering re-audit on drift or degradation

accuracy_drop.description: Maximum allowed accuracy drop percentage before triggering re-audit

data_drift.description: Maximum allowed data drift score (e.g., PSI) before re-audit

explanation_divergence.description: Maximum allowed explanation feature importance divergence
